glosses.vi: thư bảo đảm; bưu gửi bảo đảm

sentences.target: Ich schicke das Einschreiben heute ab.

translations.de: Ich schicke das Einschreiben heute ab.
translations.en: I’m sending the registered letter today.
translations.he: אני שולח היום את המכתב הרשום.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi gửi thư bảo đảm.
translations.nl: Vandaag verstuur ik de aangetekende brief.
translations.hi: मैं आज पंजीकृत पत्र भेज रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: I dag sender jeg et rekommandert brev.
translations.id: Hari ini saya mengirim surat tercatat.
translations.sv: I dag skickar jag ett rekommenderat brev.
translations.da: I dag sender jeg et anbefalet brev.
translations.ja: 今日は書留を送ります。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; part of the separable verb construction 'abschicken' with particle 'ab'; takes the accusative direct object 'das Einschreiben'.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Einschreiben' functioning as the direct object.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; the direct object of 'schicke'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase, indicating the time of the action.
Separable verbal particle combining with 'schicke' to form 'abschicken' ('to send off').

translations.fr: Une lettre recommandée est arrivée aujourd’hui.
translations.vi: Hôm nay thư bảo đảm đã đến.
translations.nl: Vandaag kwam er een aangetekende brief binnen.
translations.nb: I dag kom det et rekommandert brev.
translations.sv: I dag kom ett rekommenderat brev.
translations.ro: Astăzi a sosit o scrisoare recomandată.
translations.da: I dag kom der et anbefalet brev.
translations.ja: 今日は書留が届きました。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb placed in clause-initial position; sets the time frame of the event.
Finite main verb, preterite (simple past) 3rd person singular; part of separable verb construction 'ankommen' with particle 'an'.
Indefinite article, neuter nominative singular; determiner of the subject 'Einschreiben'.
Neuter noun, nominative singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Separable verbal particle combining with 'kam' to form 'ankommen' ('to arrive').

sentences.target: Du kannst das Einschreiben morgen abholen.

translations.de: Du kannst das Einschreiben morgen abholen.
translations.en: You can pick up the registered letter tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana puedes recoger la carta certificada.
translations.fr: Tu peux récupérer la lettre recommandée demain.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以明天去取挂号信。
translations.yue: 你可以聽日去攞掛號信。
translations.ru: Ты можешь забрать заказное письмо завтра.
translations.pt: Você pode retirar a carta registrada amanhã.
translations.he: אתה יכול לאסוף את המכתב הרשום מחר.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể nhận thư bảo đảm vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: Je kunt de aangetekende brief morgen ophalen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш забрати рекомендований лист завтра.
translations.hi: तुम कल पंजीकृत पत्र ले सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να παραλάβεις το συστημένο γράμμα αύριο.
translations.nb: Du kan hente det rekommanderte brevet i morgen.
translations.id: Kamu bisa mengambil surat tercatat besok.
translations.sv: Du kan hämta det rekommenderade brevet i morgon.
translations.cs: Můžeš si zítra vyzvednout doporučený dopis.
translations.da: Du kan hente det anbefalede brevet i morgen.
translations.ja: 書留は明日受け取れます。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person singular; selects the infinitive 'abholen' as the main verb.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Einschreiben' as the direct object of 'abholen'.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of the infinitive verb 'abholen'.
Temporal adverb modifying the verbal action; denotes future time.
Infinitive main verb in a modal construction; separable verb used here in its unsplit infinitive form, meaning 'to pick up'.

sentences.target: Sie bringt das Einschreiben zur Post.

translations.de: Sie bringt das Einschreiben zur Post.
translations.en: She is taking the registered letter to the post office.
translations.es: Ella lleva la carta certificada a la oficina de correos.
translations.fr: Elle apporte la lettre recommandée à la poste.
translations.ru: Она несёт заказное письмо на почту.
translations.pt: Ela está levando a carta registrada ao correio.
translations.he: היא לוקחת את המכתב הרשום לדואר.
translations.vi: Cô ấy mang thư bảo đảm đến bưu điện.
translations.ar: هي تأخذ الرسالة المسجلة إلى مكتب البريد.
translations.nl: Ze brengt de aangetekende brief naar het postkantoor.
translations.uk: Вона несе рекомендований лист на пошту.
translations.hu: A postára viszi az ajánlott levelet.
translations.hi: वह पंजीकृत पत्र पोस्ट ऑफिस ले जा रही है.
translations.pl: Ona niesie list polecony na pocztę.
translations.el: Παίρνει το συστημένο γράμμα στο ταχυδρομείο.
translations.nb: Hun tar det rekommanderte brevet til posten.
translations.id: Dia membawa surat tercatat ke kantor pos.
translations.sv: Hon tar det rekommenderade brevet till posten.
translations.ro: Ea duce scrisoarea recomandată la poștă.
translations.cs: Ona nese doporučený dopis na poštu.
translations.da: Hun tager det anbefalede brev med til posthuset.
translations.ja: 彼女は書留を郵便局に持っていきます。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; takes the accusative object 'das Einschreiben' and a directional prepositional phrase 'zur Post'.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of 'Einschreiben' functioning as the direct object.
Neuter noun, accusative singular; direct object of 'bringt'.
Preposition (contracted form of 'zu der') governing dative; introduces the prepositional phrase indicating destination.
Feminine noun, dative singular as object of the preposition 'zur'; part of a destination PP.
